name: YouTube Fast Controls
description: Fast YouTube automation using Android intents, media keys, uidump selectors, and learned reusable UI patterns.

toolDeclarations.name: youtube_search
toolDeclarations.description: Open YouTube and search for a video, song, artist, channel, or topic. Optionally play the first visible result.

query.description: Search query to type into YouTube.

playFirst.description: Whether to tap the first playable visible result after searching. Defaults to true.

toolDeclarations.name: youtube_play_pause
toolDeclarations.description: Toggle play/pause in YouTube using Android media controls. Use for play, pause, resume, or stop current playback.

toolDeclarations.name: youtube_share_current
toolDeclarations.description: Open the share sheet for the current YouTube video using uidump selectors.

toolDeclarations.name: youtube_comment_current
toolDeclarations.description: Open comments for the current YouTube video and type a comment. Does not submit automatically unless submit is true.

submit.description: Whether to submit/send the comment after typing. Defaults to false for safety.

toolDeclarations.name: youtube_observe_screen
toolDeclarations.description: Inspect the current YouTube screen with uidump and remember visible controls for faster future actions.
